VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Gemma 3 Technical Report" is confirmed real at arXiv:2503.19786, published March 25, 2025. The cited authors (Gemma Team, Aishwarya Kamath, Johan Ferret, Shreya Pathak, etc.) exactly match those on record. The automated checker's "mismatch" is a formatting artifact of the large collaborative authorship style, which is an acceptable shorthand per the evaluation rules.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.19786
